title: Expenses
empty: No expenses yet. Add one to start tracking.
noTeam: Pick a team above to see its expenses.

recategorizeBanner.title: {count, plural, =1 {1 expense in 'Other' category} other {# expenses in 'Other' category}}.
recategorizeBanner.body: Recategorize before running tax reports — imported expenses default to 'Other' until you classify them.

import.title: Import expenses from CSV
import.description: Bulk-load historical expenses from a Date / Amount / Item / Comments CSV. Every row lands in category "Other" — recategorize on the Expenses page after import.

toast.bulkDeleted: {count, plural, =1 {1 expense deleted} other {# expenses deleted}}
toast.bulkCategorized: Category set on {count, plural, =1 {1 expense} other {# expenses}}
toast.bulkProjectAssigned: Project assigned to {count, plural, =1 {1 expense} other {# expenses}}

split.title: Split this expense
split.subtitle: Splits sum to the original amount ({amount}). Each row gets its own category.

fields.notesHint: Audit-trail metadata. Receipt or order numbers, vendor confirmation IDs, anything you'd want to find later.
fields.author: By

software.description: Apps, SaaS, hosting, and dev tools — anything where you pay to use software.
software.examples: G Suite · Jira · Adobe CC · Slack · Notion · Linode / AWS / Vercel

hardware.description: Physical computing equipment that lasts more than a year.
hardware.examples: Laptop · monitor · keyboard · external drive · printer · networking gear

subscriptions.description: Non-software recurring memberships. Software subs go under Software.
subscriptions.examples: Industry magazines · paid newsletters · professional associations · co-working membership

travel.examples: Flights · hotels · rental cars · ride share · mileage · airport parking

meals.description: Business meals (50% deductible per IRS Schedule C in the US).
meals.examples: Client lunches · working dinners while traveling · prospect coffees

office.description: Supplies, furniture, decor, and improvements to your workspace.
office.examples: Pens / paper · desk / chair · blinds · plants · wall art · cleaning supplies

professional_services.description: Outside professionals you hired — not your own labor.
professional_services.examples: Legal fees · accountant · bookkeeper · contracted designer / developer

fees.examples: Bank fees · wire transfers · Stripe / PayPal fees · state filing fees · late penalties

other.description: Catch-all for things that don't fit anywhere else. Re-categorize before tax reports.
other.examples: Default for CSV-imported rows · edge cases your bookkeeper hasn't classified yet

categoryDocsHint: Not sure which category? See the reference.
